enabled.description: Enable or disable periodic report notifications.

frequency.description: At which frequency you receive periodic report notifications.

values.unknown_frequency: If unspecified, the frequency is unknown by default
values.monthly: The periodic report is sent once a month
values.weekly: The periodic report is sent once a week
values.daily: The periodic report is sent once a day

sending_hour.description: At which hour you receive periodic report notifications.

sending_day.description: On which day you receive periodic report notifications (1-7 weekly, 1-28 monthly).
